comparison.name: standard_single_fusion_head
comparison.description: Phase 8 standard pipeline: train encoders, freeze embeddings, then train a single FusionHead.

comparison.name: standard_frozen_embedding_moe
comparison.description: Phase 8 standard MoE probe: same frozen 2D/3D embeddings, MoE fusion head only.

comparison.name: end_to_end_moe
comparison.description: True end-to-end run: GPSWrapper + SchNetWrapper + MoEFusionHead trained jointly from the bottom encoder layers.

decision.reason: The 30K true end-to-end MoE is feasible but worse than the standard 30K controls, especially Gap MAE (+0.0105 to +0.0109 eV).
decision.recommended_next: Run common OOD/hard evaluation for old30k vs replacement30k; if coverage helps, train full replacement300k with the standard single FusionHead first.
